description: 6分基础词汇。描述你长大的地方。
examples_json: [{"en":"My hometown is a small city.","zh":"我的家乡是一个小城市。"}]
[{"en":"I live in a comfortable flat.","zh":"我住在一个舒适的公寓里。"}]
[{"en":"It's a quiet neighborhood.","zh":"这是一个安静的社区。"}]
[{"en":"My major is Computer Science.","zh":"我的专业是计算机科学。"}]
[{"en":"I'm building a career in marketing.","zh":"我在市场营销领域发展职业。"}]
[{"en":"My main hobby is photography.","zh":"我的主要爱好是摄影。"}]
[{"en":"In my leisure time, I like to read.","zh":"空闲时我喜欢阅读。"}]
[{"en":"Public transportation is convenient here.","zh":"这里的公共交通很方便。"}]
[{"en":"I prefer taking the subway.","zh":"我更喜欢坐地铁。"}]
[{"en":"I highly recommend this place.","zh":"我强烈推荐这个地方。"}]
[{"en":"The view was magnificent.","zh":"景色壮丽。"}]
[{"en":"The sunset was breathtaking.","zh":"日落令人叹为观止。"}]
[{"en":"Tourism brings many benefits.","zh":"旅游业带来很多好处。"}]
[{"en":"The city needs better infrastructure.","zh":"这个城市需要更好的基础设施。"}]
[{"en":"We need sustainable tourism.","zh":"我们需要可持续旅游。"}]
[{"en":"She left a deep impression on me.","zh":"她给我留下了深刻印象。"}]
[{"en":"She has a warm personality.","zh":"她性格温暖。"}]
[{"en":"We live in the digital age.","zh":"我们生活在数字时代。"}]
[{"en":"Online interaction can't replace face-to-face communication.","zh":"线上互动不能替代面对面交流。"}]
[{"en":"It was a truly memorable experience.","zh":"那真是一次难忘的经历。"}]

description: 8分词汇。从经历中获得新的视角。
examples_json: [{"en":"This experience gave me a new perspective.","zh":"这次经历给了我新的视角。"}]
[{"en":"Education has evolved significantly.","zh":"教育已经发生了显著的演变。"}]
[{"en":"Schools should encourage critical thinking.","zh":"学校应该鼓励批判性思维。"}]
[{"en":"We need greater global awareness.","zh":"我们需要更强的全球意识。"}]
[{"en":"We share a common vision for the future.","zh":"我们对未来有共同的愿景。"}]
[{"en":"Globalization has both advantages and disadvantages.","zh":"全球化有利也有弊。"}]
[{"en":"Cultural diversity should be celebrated.","zh":"文化多样性应该被珍视。"}]
[{"en":"Cultural homogenization is a risk of globalization.","zh":"文化同质化是全球化的一个风险。"}]
